title: LASERS!
description: Have you ever wanted a customizable laser drill in Minecraft?
body:
A mod to a upgradable laser drill!
Features:
- Laser Drill MK1
  - 4 Upgrade Slots
  - 1 Battery Slot
  - Iron Pickaxe Mining Level 
  - 6 Attack Damage
  - Spins!
- Battery
  - 5k FE Storage
- Laser Workbench 
  - Change Upgrades in the drill
  - Has a energy buffer of 50k FE

Upgrades
- Only one color type can be equipped at a time
- Yellow
  - Haste
    - Increases mining speed at 50%
    - Increases energy usage
  - Fortune
    - 3x drop rate on ores
    - 2x netherite scrap on ancient debris
- Red
  - Efficiency 
    - Reduces energy usage of drill
- Gery
  - Hardness
    - Increases mining level to diamond
- Blue
  - Sonar
    - Press 'Z' to scan, can change keybind in settings
    - Creates a visual field of nearby ores in 16 block radius, includes ore name
    - Align crosshair to ore marker
    - Costs a signifcant amount of energy
    - Works for all ores

Requires:
 - Fabric API
 - Geckolib
 - Any Energy Mod

Planned ports:
 - Neoforge 1.20.1
 - Forge 1.20.1
 - Fabric 1.20.1
